description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Release that runs on push to the master branch. Use an ubuntu-latest job with write id-token permission that checks out the repository with full history, sets up Python 3.9, upgrades pip and installs wheel, setuptools, packaging, twine, and build. Then, update the version number using a Python script, build the package, and publish it to PyPI using the pypa/gh-action-pypi-publish action.
